div.div:
Scheduled Pickup Date :-
var dtToday = new Date(); var month = dtToday.getMonth() + 1; var day = dtToday.getDate(); var year = dtToday.getFullYear(); if(month < 10) month = '0' + month.toString(); if(day > 10) day = day.toString(); var maxDate = year + '-' + month + '-' + day; // or instead: // var maxDate = dtToday.toISOString().substr(0, 10); document.getElementById("scheduled_date").setAttribute("min", maxDate);

div.label: Special Stock:
